content.text:
### 💡 Summary of Key Points
- Worship (**Ubudiyyah**) is the supreme purpose of our existence.
- We are chosen as **Khalifah** (vicegerents) of Allah on Earth and responsibility.
- This world is a place of trial, growth, and patience preparing for the Hereafter.

--- 

### 📖 Deeper Explanation
**Ubudiyyah (Worship)**
Our creation is purposeful. Allah explicitly states, "I did not create jinn and humans except to worship Me" (51:56). Worship is not just ritual prayer (Salah); any noble action performed with a pure intention transforms into continuous worship.

content.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْتُ الْجِنَّ وَالْإِنسَ إِلَّا لِيَعْبُدُونِ
content.translation: I did not create the jinn and humans except to worship Me.
This world is a bridge; pass over it, but do not build upon it.
